name: social-automation
description: Universal Social Distribution & Automation System — a plugin-based TypeScript/Node framework.

pnpm.//: better-sqlite3 (an OPTIONAL dep of @social/db) is intentionally NOT in onlyBuiltDependencies: its native build needs a C++ toolchain that isn't available in every environment, and @social/db auto-falls-back to the built-in node:sqlite engine when the binding is absent. To use the faster native engine, add "better-sqlite3" here (or run `pnpm approve-builds better-sqlite3`) on a machine with a toolchain/prebuilt binary.
